props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the component.

props.name: compact
props.description: Make nav group more compact by cutting all `padding` in half.

props.name: onVisibleChange
props.description:
Callback fired when the user toggles the group. Receives the requested visibility. Provide
it together with `visible` for controlled mode—update `visible` from here, or ignore the
change to keep the group as is.

props.name: visible
props.description:
Show nav group items. Acts as the initial state when used on its own, or as the controlled
value when paired with `onVisibleChange`.
